_comment: REPLACE THIS FILE with your sanitised n8n export.
_instructions: Export your workflow from n8n (... menu -> Download).
Before committing, remove every credential, webhook URL, API key,
account handle, client name and hardcoded ID. Replace URLs with
placeholders like https://example.com/webhook. Read it line by line;
n8n exports embed credential stubs and node parameters that can leak
real data. Keep the node graph and structure so the architecture is
visible, but nothing that could be pointed at a live target.
name: content-pipeline (sanitised)
